description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house with a flat roof and a modern, boxy architectural style. The front facade features a central entry gate, a balcony with a metal railing above, and symmetrical window placement. The property is bordered by hedges and includes a driveway with a parked car on one side, as well as manicured bushes and a small garden area. The rear of the house has a spacious balcony or terrace, partially enclosed by railings, and large windows that provide ample natural light. The exterior is predominantly white, with some dark accents on the lower level and greenery integrated into the landscaping. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, balconies, and landscaped greenery, including a driveway and garden. The design features clean lines and a spacious, functional layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry gate, symmetrical windows, balcony with railing, driveway with car, and manicured bushes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, tall hedges, and the side garden with several round bushes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large balcony or terrace with metal railing, large windows, and a more open garden area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the balcony, large windows, and tall privacy hedges.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry gate with a small porch, flanked by manicured bushes and topped by a balcony with a metal railing.
